title: Citrus Shrimp Stew
description: A dense and citrusy Dutch dish featuring shrimp in a slow-cooked vegetarian-friendly stew.

ingredients.name: 1 lb large shrimp
ingredients.notes: Peel and devein if using regular shrimp

ingredients.name: 1 can (8 oz) diced tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Cherry or grape varieties are nice for the texture and flavor

ingredients.name: Pinch of red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: Optional, adds a bit of heat

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, combine shrimp with lemons' juice, zest of both lemons, limes' juice, and zest.
Add olive oil to the pot, followed by finely chopped onion and garlic. Stir well to ensure the onions are coated in oil.
Increase heat to medium-high and sauté until the onions are translucent and lightly golden.
Toss in diced tomatoes with their juices and add vegetable broth, then stir gently to dissolve any solids from the bottom of the pot.
Bring the mixture to a simmer. Then reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and let it cook for about 20 minutes without stirring.
Add red pepper flakes if using, along with salt and black pepper to taste, and stir gently again.
Let it continue to simmer for another 15-20 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly. Adjust seasoning as needed.
